gist.headline: Welcome, Learnty!
gist.blurb: Learnty just sprouted in the community greenhouse. It turns boring study material into AI-generated learning games, because flashcards are so 2010.
gist.summary: Added Learnty, an AI-powered personalized learning game generator, to the community app showcase.
gist.impact: Users can now discover Learnty in the app directory to create interactive exercises for mastering new concepts.
gist.visual_concept: The PR is about an educational gaming app. Visual symbols: books, game controllers, puzzle pieces. Characters: Polly the bee and the Monitor Robot. Scene: Polly and the robot playing a cozy educational game together, surrounded by glowing books and puzzle pieces.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing tiny reading glasses, playing an educational game on a retro console with the chunky monitor robot. Glowing puzzle pieces and books float around them. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
